texto: Dignity is the only one thing I have chosen over rules and benefits of slavery. I am not perfect because I chose to be myself
autor: a human and this is the simplest form of dignity.
explicacao: Citação de a human and this is the simplest form of dignity. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Dignity is the only one thing I have chosen over rules and benefits of slavery. I am not perfect …” articula reflexao, rola-mahmoud, dignity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
